response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust exposure in commercial routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang over the required C++ core, raising concerns about fit for the role’s technical depth.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages
Experience with distributed systems, low-latency apps, and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or map tile pipelines
Primary language focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++
Lacks explicit experience with navigation systems, traffic integration, or routing data consistency
